description: This should be the pre-footer please consider making it static across all pages/
fix_summary: Extracted the 'Our Office' section (hours, address, contact) from the homepage into a PreFooter.astro component and added it to BaseLayout.astro, so it now appears on every page before the Footer.

changes.summary: New component: Our Office section with office hours, address, email, and phone
Added PreFooter import and <PreFooter /> between main content and Footer
Removed the hardcoded Our Office section (now rendered globally by BaseLayout)
